journeys.name: Login as parent and redirect to dashboard
journeys.description: Parent logs in with credentials and is redirected to /parent dashboard

journeys.name: Dashboard loads with welcome heading
journeys.description: Parent dashboard renders the personalized welcome heading with child name

journeys.name: Dashboard has no bad text or errors
journeys.description: Parent dashboard renders without error messages, undefined values, or placeholder text

journeys.name: Dashboard shows Profile Views metric card
journeys.description: The Profile Views stat card is visible with the visibility icon and 'This month' label

journeys.name: Dashboard shows Coach Messages metric card
journeys.description: The Coach Messages stat card is visible with unread count

journeys.name: Dashboard shows Schools Tracking metric card
journeys.description: The Schools Tracking stat card is visible with 'Showing interest' label

journeys.name: Dashboard shows Upcoming Deadlines metric card
journeys.description: The Upcoming Deadlines stat card is visible with calendar icon

journeys.name: Dashboard Recent Activity widget with View All link
journeys.description: Recent Activity section renders with a View All link pointing to /parent/activity

journeys.name: Dashboard College Interest section with View All link
journeys.description: College Interest section renders with a View All link pointing to /parent/schools

journeys.name: Dashboard Recruiting Calendar section with View Full Calendar link
journeys.description: Recruiting Calendar section renders with View Full Calendar link to /parent/calendar

journeys.name: Dashboard Quick Action: View Profile card links to /parent/profile
journeys.description: The View Profile quick action card has a link pointing to /parent/profile and shows 'See what coaches see'

journeys.name: Dashboard Quick Action: Message History card links to /messages
journeys.description: The Message History quick action card has a link pointing to /messages

journeys.name: Dashboard Quick Action: Academic Requirements card
journeys.description: The Academic Requirements quick action card is visible with NCAA eligibility info subtitle

journeys.name: Dashboard Quick Action: Compliance Info card
journeys.description: The Compliance Info quick action card is visible with 'Know the rules' subtitle

journeys.name: Navigate View Profile quick action to /parent/profile
journeys.description: Clicking the View Profile quick action navigates to the child profile page

journeys.name: Navigate Resources quick action to /parent/resources
journeys.description: Clicking the Resources link navigates to the NCAA resources page

journeys.name: Profile page: child avatar or initials visible
journeys.description: The profile page renders the child avatar image or initials circle

journeys.name: Profile page: child name heading visible
journeys.description: The profile page displays the child name as a heading

journeys.name: Profile page: position with sports_football icon
journeys.description: The profile page shows the child position alongside a sports_football material icon

journeys.name: Profile page: Class year visible
journeys.description: The profile page shows 'Class of' followed by the graduation year

journeys.name: Profile page: read-only with no edit buttons
journeys.description: The parent profile view is read-only; there are no edit or save buttons visible

journeys.name: Profile page: Back to Dashboard link navigates to /parent
journeys.description: The Back to Dashboard link on the profile page navigates back to the parent dashboard

journeys.name: Schools page: heading College Interest
journeys.description: The schools page renders with 'College Interest' heading

journeys.name: Schools page: list or empty state visible
journeys.description: The schools page shows either a list of schools or an empty state message

journeys.name: Calendar page: heading Recruiting Calendar
journeys.description: The calendar page renders with 'Recruiting Calendar' heading

journeys.name: Calendar page: events or empty state rendered
journeys.description: The calendar page shows either calendar events or an empty state with 'No upcoming events'

journeys.name: Activity page: heading Recent Activity
journeys.description: The activity page renders with 'Recent Activity' heading

journeys.name: Activity page: Refresh button is visible and functional
journeys.description: The activity page has a Refresh button that can be clicked without errors

journeys.name: Activity page: items or empty state visible
journeys.description: The activity page shows either activity items or an empty state with 'No recent activity'

journeys.name: Resources page: heading NCAA Resources
journeys.description: The resources page renders with 'NCAA Resources' heading

steps.value: Essential information for the recruiting process

journeys.name: Resources page: Eligibility Requirements card visible
journeys.description: The resources page shows the Eligibility Requirements card with description

journeys.name: Resources page: NCAA Recruiting Rules card visible
journeys.description: The resources page shows the NCAA Recruiting Rules card with description

journeys.name: Resources page: Important Dates card visible
journeys.description: The resources page shows the Important Dates card with deadline information

journeys.name: Resources page: Helpful Links card visible
journeys.description: The resources page shows the Helpful Links card with external resource description

journeys.name: Resources page: Learn More links have ncaa.org href and open in new tab
journeys.description: All 4 Learn More links point to ncaa.org URLs and have target=_blank

journeys.name: Sidebar: Dashboard nav link visible
journeys.description: The parent sidebar shows the Dashboard navigation item linking to /parent

journeys.name: Sidebar: Child's Profile nav link visible
journeys.description: The parent sidebar shows the Child's Profile navigation item linking to /parent/profile

journeys.name: Sidebar: Messages nav link visible
journeys.description: The parent sidebar shows the Messages navigation item linking to /messages

journeys.name: Sidebar: Calendar, Schools, Resources nav links visible
journeys.description: The parent sidebar shows Calendar, Schools, and Resources navigation items

journeys.name: Sidebar: Settings and Help Center links visible
journeys.description: The parent sidebar shows Settings and Help Center links in the bottom section

journeys.name: Sidebar: Sign Out button visible
journeys.description: The parent sidebar shows a Sign Out button at the bottom
